name: openclaw
description: OpenClaw - Personal AI Assistant WhatsApp Bot powered by Claude

scripts.test: shx rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && shx cp -r souls dist-test/souls && shx cp -r workspace dist-test/workspace && shx cp .env dist-test/.env && node --require ./dist-test/tests/setup.js --test --test-concurrency=1 dist-test/tests/*.test.js
scripts.benchmark: shx rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && shx cp -r souls dist-test/souls && shx cp -r workspace dist-test/workspace && shx cp .env dist-test/.env && node dist-test/tests/benchmark/run-benchmarks.js
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd dashboard && npm install
